name: Deploy CloudFormation

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - dev
      - test
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  deploy:
    name: Deploy CloudFormation Stack
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    env:
      STACK_NAME: 'aws-365-template'
      AWS_REGION: ${{ secrets.AWS_REGION }}
      AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID: ${{ secrets.AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID }}
      AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY: ${{ secrets.AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY }}
      AWS_BUCKET_NAME: 'aws-365'
      AWS_BUCKET_PATH: 'cf-templates'
      AWS_BUCKET_URL: 'https://s3.amazonaws.com/aws-365/cf-templates'
      AWS_BUDGET_REGION: ${{ secrets.AWS_BUDGET_REGION }}
      AWS_BUDGET_LIMIT: ${{ secrets.AWS_BUDGET_LIMIT }}
      AWS_BUDGET_EMAIL: ${{ secrets.AWS_BUDGET_EMAIL }}

    steps:
      - name: Checkout Code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Configure AWS Credentials
        uses: aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials@v2
        with:
          aws-access-key-id: ${{ env.AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID }}
          aws-secret-access-key: ${{ env.AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY }}
          aws-region: ${{ env.AWS_REGION }}
    
      - name: Create S3 Bucket if not exists
        run: |
          if ! aws s3api head-bucket --bucket ${AWS_BUCKET_NAME} 2>/dev/null; then
            aws s3api create-bucket --bucket ${AWS_BUCKET_NAME}
          fi

      - name: Upload CloudFormation Template to S3
        run: |
          for file in $(find ./infrastructure/cf-templates -type f -name '*.yml'); do
              aws s3 cp $file s3://${AWS_BUCKET_NAME}/${AWS_BUCKET_PATH}/$(basename $file)
          done
    
      - name: Check for Failed Stack and Handle Appropriately
        id: stack_check
        run: |
          if aws cloudformation describe-stacks --stack-name ${{ env.STACK_NAME }} 2>/dev/null; then
            STACK_STATUS=$(aws cloudformation describe-stacks --stack-name ${{ env.STACK_NAME }} --query "Stacks[0].StackStatus" --output text)
            echo "Current stack status: $STACK_STATUS"
            
            if [[ "$STACK_STATUS" == "ROLLBACK_COMPLETE" ]]; then
              echo "Stack is in ROLLBACK_COMPLETE state. Deleting stack before recreating..."
              aws cloudformation delete-stack --stack-name ${{ env.STACK_NAME }}
              echo "Waiting for stack deletion to complete..."
              aws cloudformation wait stack-delete-complete --stack-name ${{ env.STACK_NAME }}
              echo "Stack deletion completed successfully"
              echo "stack_updated=false" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
              exit 0
            elif [[ "$STACK_STATUS" == "UPDATE_ROLLBACK_FAILED" ]]; then
              # Handle the UPDATE_ROLLBACK_FAILED state
              echo "Stack is in UPDATE_ROLLBACK_FAILED state. Attempting to continue rollback..."
              
              # Try to continue the rollback
              aws cloudformation continue-update-rollback --stack-name ${{ env.STACK_NAME }}
              
              # Wait for rollback to complete
              echo "Waiting for rollback to complete..."
              aws cloudformation wait stack-rollback-complete --stack-name ${{ env.STACK_NAME }} || {
                echo "Rollback could not be continued. Deleting stack to recover..."
                aws cloudformation delete-stack --stack-name ${{ env.STACK_NAME }}
                echo "Waiting for stack deletion to complete..."
                aws cloudformation wait stack-delete-complete --stack-name ${{ env.STACK_NAME }}
                echo "Stack deletion completed successfully"
                echo "stack_updated=false" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
                exit 0
              }
              
              echo "Rollback completed successfully. Stack is now ready for updates."
              echo "stack_updated=false" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
              exit 0
            elif [[ "$STACK_STATUS" == "CREATE_FAILED" || "$STACK_STATUS" == "UPDATE_ROLLBACK_COMPLETE" || "$STACK_STATUS" == "UPDATE_ROLLBACK_FAILED" ]]; then
              echo "Stack is in failed state ($STACK_STATUS). Creating change set for update..."
              
              # Create change set
              aws cloudformation create-change-set \
                --stack-name ${{ env.STACK_NAME }} \
                --change-set-name UpdateStack \
                --template-body file://./infrastructure/cf-templates/main.yml \
                --capabilities CAPABILITY_IAM CAPABILITY_NAMED_IAM \
                --parameters ParameterKey=BucketPath,ParameterValue=${{ env.AWS_BUCKET_URL }} \
                --change-set-type UPDATE
                
              # Wait for change set creation
              aws cloudformation wait change-set-create-complete \
                --stack-name ${{ env.STACK_NAME }} \
                --change-set-name UpdateStack || {
                # When change set creation fails, it could be due to no changes detected
                # (which is normal and should not be treated as an error).
                # This check differentiates between a "no changes" scenario (treated as success)
                # versus an actual error in the change set creation process.
                # For "no changes" cases, we mark the stack as already updated to skip deployment.
                if aws cloudformation describe-change-set --stack-name ${{ env.STACK_NAME }} --change-set-name UpdateStack | grep -q "The submitted information didn't contain changes"; then
                  echo "No changes to deploy"
                  echo "stack_updated=true" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
                  exit 0
                else
                  echo "Change set creation failed"
                  echo "stack_updated=false" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
                  exit 1
                fi
              }
              
              # Execute change set
              aws cloudformation execute-change-set \
                --stack-name ${{ env.STACK_NAME }} \
                --change-set-name UpdateStack
              
              # Wait for stack update
              aws cloudformation wait stack-update-complete \
                --stack-name ${{ env.STACK_NAME }}
              
              echo "Stack update initiated"
              echo "stack_updated=true" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
              exit 0
            fi
          else
            echo "Stack does not exist yet or could not be described."
            echo "stack_updated=false" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          fi
          

      - name: Deploy CloudFormation Stack
        # Only deploy if previous steps succeeded AND the stack wasn't already updated by change sets.
        # This prevents duplicate deployments when the stack was successfully recovered from a failed state.
        if: success() && steps.stack_check.outputs.stack_updated != 'true' 
        run: |
          aws cloudformation deploy \
            --template-file ./infrastructure/cf-templates/main.yml \
            --stack-name ${{ env.STACK_NAME }} \
            --capabilities CAPABILITY_IAM CAPABILITY_NAMED_IAM \
            --parameter-overrides \
                BucketPath=${{ env.AWS_BUCKET_URL }}

      - name: Deploy Budget Stack in us-east-1
        run: |
          aws cloudformation deploy \
            --template-file ./infrastructure/cf-templates/budget.yml \
            --stack-name aws365-budget-stack \
            --capabilities CAPABILITY_NAMED_IAM \
            --region ${{ env.AWS_BUDGET_REGION }} \
            --parameter-overrides \
              BudgetLimit=${{ env.AWS_BUDGET_LIMIT }} \
              NotificationEmail=${{ env.AWS_BUDGET_EMAIL }}


####################################
## NOW fails
####################################

      # - name: Check CloudFormation Stack and Recover on Failed Updates
      #   id: stack_recovery
      #   run: |
      #       set -e

      #       # 1. Does the stack exist? If not, proceed to initial create.

      #       --stack-name ${{ env.STACK_NAME }} \

      #           echo "Rollback complete; stack is now in UPDATE_ROLLBACK_COMPLETE."
      #           echo "STACK_STATUS=ROLLED_BACK" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
      #           ;;

      #       # 3b. In UPDATE_ROLLBACK_COMPLETE → stack is healthy; proceed to update
      #       UPDATE_ROLLBACK_COMPLETE|UPDATE_COMPLETE|UPDATE_COMPLETE_CLEANUP_IN_PROGRESS)
      #           echo "Stack is in a stable state ($STACK_STATUS). Ready for update."
      #           echo "STACK_STATUS=READY_FOR_UPDATE" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
      #           ;;

      #       # 3c. In ROLLBACK_COMPLETE or CREATE_FAILED → unrecoverable without deletion
      #       ROLLBACK_COMPLETE|CREATE_FAILED)
      #           echo "Stack is in $STACK_STATUS; cannot update. Manual intervention required."
      #           echo "STACK_STATUS=UNRECOVERABLE" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
      #           ;;

      #       # 3d. In CREATE_IN_PROGRESS, UPDATE_IN_PROGRESS, ROLLBACK_IN_PROGRESS etc. → wait or abort
      #       CREATE_IN_PROGRESS|UPDATE_IN_PROGRESS|ROLLBACK_IN_PROGRESS|UPDATE_ROLLBACK_IN_PROGRESS)
      #           echo "Stack is in-progress ($STACK_STATUS). Please wait until complete."
      #           echo "STACK_STATUS=IN_PROGRESS" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
      #           ;;

      #       # 3e. Any other state → treat as healthy if CREATE_COMPLETE, or manual fix otherwise
      #       CREATE_COMPLETE)
      #           echo "Stack is in CREATE_COMPLETE. Ready for operations."
      #           echo "STACK_STATUS=READY_FOR_UPDATE" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
      #           ;;
      #       *)
      #           echo "Encountered unhandled stack status: $STACK_STATUS"
      #           echo "STACK_STATUS=UNKNOWN_STATE" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
      #           ;;
      #       esac


      # - name: Check CloudFormation Stack and Recover on Failed Updates
      #   id: stack_recovery
      #   run: |
      #       set -e

      #       # 1. Does the stack exist? If not, proceed to initial create.
      #       if ! aws cloudformation describe-stacks --stack-name ${{ env.STACK_NAME }} 2>/dev/null; then
      #       echo "STACK_STATUS=NOT_EXIST" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
      #       exit 0
      #       fi

      #       # 2. Retrieve current stack status
      #       STACK_STATUS=$(aws cloudformation describe-stacks \
      #       --stack-name ${{ env.STACK_NAME }} \
      #       --query "Stacks[0].StackStatus" \
      #       --output text)
      #       echo "Current stack status: $STACK_STATUS"

      #       case "$STACK_STATUS" in
      #       # 3a. In UPDATE_ROLLBACK_FAILED → continue the rollback
      #       UPDATE_ROLLBACK_FAILED)
      #           echo "State is UPDATE_ROLLBACK_FAILED. Continuing rollback..."
      #           aws cloudformation continue-update-rollback --stack-name ${{ env.STACK_NAME }}

      #           echo "Waiting for rollback to complete..."
      #           aws cloudformation wait stack-rollback-complete --stack-name ${{ env.STACK_NAME }}
      #           echo "Rollback complete; stack is now in UPDATE_ROLLBACK_COMPLETE."
      #           echo "STACK_STATUS=ROLLED_BACK" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
      #           ;;

      #       # 3b. In UPDATE_ROLLBACK_COMPLETE → stack is healthy; proceed to update
      #       UPDATE_ROLLBACK_COMPLETE|UPDATE_COMPLETE|UPDATE_COMPLETE_CLEANUP_IN_PROGRESS)
      #           echo "Stack is in a stable state ($STACK_STATUS). Ready for update."
      #           echo "STACK_STATUS=READY_FOR_UPDATE" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
      #           ;;

      #       # 3c. In ROLLBACK_COMPLETE or CREATE_FAILED → unrecoverable without deletion
      #       ROLLBACK_COMPLETE|CREATE_FAILED)
      #           echo "Stack is in $STACK_STATUS; cannot update. Manual intervention required."
      #           echo "STACK_STATUS=UNRECOVERABLE" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
      #           ;;

      #       # 3d. In CREATE_IN_PROGRESS, UPDATE_IN_PROGRESS, ROLLBACK_IN_PROGRESS etc. → wait or abort
      #       CREATE_IN_PROGRESS|UPDATE_IN_PROGRESS|ROLLBACK_IN_PROGRESS|UPDATE_ROLLBACK_IN_PROGRESS)
      #           echo "Stack is in-progress ($STACK_STATUS). Please wait until complete."
      #           echo "STACK_STATUS=IN_PROGRESS" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
      #           ;;

      #       # 3e. Any other state → treat as healthy if CREATE_COMPLETE, or manual fix otherwise
      #       CREATE_COMPLETE)
      #           echo "Stack is in CREATE_COMPLETE. Ready for operations."
      #           echo "STACK_STATUS=READY_FOR_UPDATE" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
      #           ;;
      #       *)
      #           echo "Encountered unhandled stack status: $STACK_STATUS"
      #           echo "STACK_STATUS=UNKNOWN_STATE" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
      #           ;;
      #       esac

      
      # - name: Check CloudFormation Stack and Recover on Failed Updates
      #   id: stack_recovery
      #   run: |
      #       set -e

      #       # 1. Does the stack exist? If not, proceed to initial create.
      #       if ! aws cloudformation describe-stacks --stack-name ${{ env.STACK_NAME }} 2>/dev/null; then
      #       echo "STACK_STATUS=NOT_EXIST" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
      #       exit 0
      #       fi

      #       # 2. Retrieve current stack status
      #       STACK_STATUS=$(aws cloudformation describe-stacks \
      #       --stack-name ${{ env.STACK_NAME }} \
      #       --query "Stacks[0].StackStatus" \
      #       --output text)
      #       echo "Current stack status: $STACK_STATUS"

      #       case "$STACK_STATUS" in
      #       # 3a. In UPDATE_ROLLBACK_FAILED → continue the rollback
      #       UPDATE_ROLLBACK_FAILED)
      #           echo "State is UPDATE_ROLLBACK_FAILED. Continuing rollback..."
      #           aws cloudformation continue-update-rollback --stack-name ${{ env.STACK_NAME }}

      #           echo "Waiting for rollback to complete..."
      #           aws cloudformation wait stack-rollback-complete --stack-name ${{ env.STACK_NAME }}
      #           echo "Rollback complete; stack is now in UPDATE_ROLLBACK_COMPLETE."
      #           echo "STACK_STATUS=ROLLED_BACK" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
      #           ;;

      #       # 3b. In UPDATE_ROLLBACK_COMPLETE → stack is healthy; proceed to update
      #       UPDATE_ROLLBACK_COMPLETE|UPDATE_COMPLETE|UPDATE_COMPLETE_CLEANUP_IN_PROGRESS)
      #           echo "Stack is in a stable state ($STACK_STATUS). Ready for update."
      #           echo "STACK_STATUS=READY_FOR_UPDATE" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
      #           ;;

      #       # 3c. In ROLLBACK_COMPLETE or CREATE_FAILED → unrecoverable without deletion
      #       ROLLBACK_COMPLETE|CREATE_FAILED)
      #           echo "Stack is in $STACK_STATUS; cannot update. Manual intervention required."
      #           echo "STACK_STATUS=UNRECOVERABLE" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
      #           ;;

      #       # 3d. In CREATE_IN_PROGRESS, UPDATE_IN_PROGRESS, ROLLBACK_IN_PROGRESS etc. → wait or abort
      #       CREATE_IN_PROGRESS|UPDATE_IN_PROGRESS|ROLLBACK_IN_PROGRESS|UPDATE_ROLLBACK_IN_PROGRESS)
      #           echo "Stack is in-progress ($STACK_STATUS). Please wait until complete."
      #           echo "STACK_STATUS=IN_PROGRESS" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
      #           ;;

      #       # 3e. Any other state → treat as healthy if CREATE_COMPLETE, or manual fix otherwise
      #       CREATE_COMPLETE)
      #           echo "Stack is in CREATE_COMPLETE. Ready for operations."
      #           echo "STACK_STATUS=READY_FOR_UPDATE" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
      #           ;;
      #       *)
      #           echo "Encountered unhandled stack status: $STACK_STATUS"
      #           echo "STACK_STATUS=UNKNOWN_STATE" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
      #           ;;
      #       esac

##################################################################################
      - name: Check CloudFormation Stack and Recover on Failed Updates
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail

          STACK_NAME="${{ env.STACK_NAME }}"

          # 1. Does the stack exist? If not, proceed to initial create.
          if ! aws cloudformation describe-stacks --stack-name "$STACK_NAME" 2>/dev/null; then
            echo "STACK_STATUS=NOT_EXIST" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
            exit 0
          fi

          # 2. Retrieve the current stack status.
          STACK_STATUS=$(aws cloudformation describe-stacks \
            --stack-name "$STACK_NAME" \
            --query "Stacks[0].StackStatus" \
            --output text)
          echo "Current stack status: $STACK_STATUS"

          case "$STACK_STATUS" in
            # 3a. In UPDATE_ROLLBACK_FAILED, attempt to continue rollback.
            UPDATE_ROLLBACK_FAILED)
              echo "State is UPDATE_ROLLBACK_FAILED. Gathering failed resources to skip..."

              # 3a.i. List resources in UPDATE_FAILED state.
              FAILED_RESOURCES=$(aws cloudformation describe-stack-events \
                --stack-name "$STACK_NAME" \
                --query "StackEvents[?ResourceStatus=='UPDATE_FAILED'].[LogicalResourceId]" \
                --output text | tr '\t' ' ' | tr '\n' ' ' | awk '{$1=$1;print}')

              if [ -z "$FAILED_RESOURCES" ]; then
                echo "No explicit failed resources found; running continue-update-rollback without skips."
                aws cloudformation continue-update-rollback --stack-name "$STACK_NAME"
              else
                echo "Skipping resources: $FAILED_RESOURCES"
                aws cloudformation continue-update-rollback \
                  --stack-name "$STACK_NAME" \
                  --resources-to-skip $FAILED_RESOURCES
              fi

              echo "Waiting for UPDATE_ROLLBACK_COMPLETE..."
              aws cloudformation wait stack-rollback-complete --stack-name "$STACK_NAME" || {
                echo "Rollback did not complete cleanly; please check stuck resources."
                echo "STACK_STATUS=ROLLBACK_FAILED" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
                exit 1
              }

              echo "Rollback complete; stack is now in UPDATE_ROLLBACK_COMPLETE."
              echo "STACK_STATUS=READY_FOR_UPDATE" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
              ;;

            # 3b. Healthy or already rolled back: proceed.
            UPDATE_ROLLBACK_COMPLETE|UPDATE_COMPLETE|UPDATE_COMPLETE_CLEANUP_IN_PROGRESS|CREATE_COMPLETE)
              echo "Stack is in stable state ($STACK_STATUS). Ready for update."
              echo "STACK_STATUS=READY_FOR_UPDATE" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
              ;;

            # 3c. In-progress states—abort the job (or wait externally).
            CREATE_IN_PROGRESS|UPDATE_IN_PROGRESS|ROLLBACK_IN_PROGRESS|UPDATE_ROLLBACK_IN_PROGRESS)
              echo "Stack is in-progress ($STACK_STATUS). Please wait until completion."
              echo "STACK_STATUS=IN_PROGRESS" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
              exit 1
              ;;

            # 3d. Irrecoverable states—require manual deletion or intervention.
            ROLLBACK_COMPLETE|CREATE_FAILED)
              echo "Stack is in $STACK_STATUS; cannot update. Manual intervention required."
              echo "STACK_STATUS=UNRECOVERABLE" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
              exit 1
              ;;

            # 3e. Any other state—flag as unknown.
            *)
              echo "Encountered unhandled stack status: $STACK_STATUS"
              echo "STACK_STATUS=UNKNOWN_STATE" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
              exit 1
              ;;
          esac
#########################################################
